summary: Decouple the work-tracker from the git-workflow enforcer
description: Two products are welded together: a work tracker (state + rationale + done-contract) and a git-workflow enforcer (branch-per-ticket, todo: commit grep, branch guards). The tracker is the differentiation; the enforcer narrows addressable workflows and should become optional. Children decouple the two so the tracker stands alone. Source: large-project usage feedback, 2026-05-27. Reference files: src/branch-guard.ts, src/config.ts, src/commands/close.ts, src/commands/work.ts, src/state.ts, src/types.ts.
